function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0011
alias: helios_followup_support_invoice
issued_on: 2026-04-20
total_eur: 550
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 160
    line_eur: 160
---
# Helios rollout support invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0011                        |
| alias          | helios_followup_support_invoice |
| issued_on      | 2026-04-20                      |
| total_eur      | 550                             |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH  |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint          |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 160      | 160      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 550      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A small late-stage invoice for rollout support after the usable version finally landed with staff.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write succeeded. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item (already read). Outbox reactive note is not applicable because no outbox file was written.
next_step.observation: Structured frontmatter was written to the target invoice file without tool error.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request successfully. I added YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2026_04_20__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md` using the finance invoice schema, extracted only visible fields from the note, preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and kept the change focused. I then deleted the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` per inbox workflow.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, read relevant workflows and schema for OCR/frontmatter migration, preserved body content under frontmatter, and deleted processed inbox file only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for a specific invoice. Schema requirements were taken from `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`. Visible fields and line items were read from the target invoice file and mapped into required fields without guessing. Cleanup action (deleting processed inbox item) is required by `99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md` and `99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
